subject: [PATCH v8 10/15] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds read-write protection (RWP) fault delivery to the userfaultfd interface, allowing userspace to track and manage RWP-protected pages. It introduces new functions for handling RWP faults at different memory levels and exposes a new UAPI command to register RWP mode. The patch also updates various kernel modules to support RWP and ensures that userspace can correctly handle RWP faults in sync-mode. The changes are designed to work with anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types.
